title: NanoMagic
description: 600+ quests, modern design, and the perfect fusion of magic & technology
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NANOMAGIC/MP_NANOMAGIC_Header.webp)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/897508851979526164?color=f3f2f4&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=f3f2f4&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/k7GvJ34Q7j)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NANOMAGIC/MP_NANOMAGIC_Description.webp)

🔮 **Dive into a world where ancient magic meets high-tech machines!**  
NanoMagic is a massive 1.12.2 modpack with over **600 quests**, **hundreds of mods**, and a carefully balanced fusion of **magic and technology**. Explore stunning biomes, conquer custom dungeons, automate everything with Mekanism and AE2, and master powerful rituals with Thaumcraft and Botania.

Designed for adventurers, builders, and engineers alike — **NanoMagic delivers a rich, immersive experience** combining futuristic industry with mystical energy. Whether you're seeking epic progression, deep exploration, or beautiful custom visuals — this pack has it all.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NANOMAGIC/MP_NANOMAGIC_Features.webp)

🧙 **Magic & Technology Fusion**  
Harness the power of Thaumcraft, Botania, Blood Magic, and blend it with industrial giants like IC2, Mekanism, AE2, and Tinkers’ Construct.

🌍 **Unique World Generation**  
Discover custom biomes, dungeons, and structures using mods like Additional Structures, NetherEx, Quark, Better Caves, and more. Every dimension is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered.

<details>
<summary>📸 Screenshots (World Generation)</summary>

![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391452901720719370/86750.webp?ex=686ded3f&is=686c9bbf&hm=21540763f50935118e22171f0ba4ccab08273bf37de6d600f9f56d4627cd927c&)  
![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391452900999430194/78961.webp?ex=686ded3f&is=686c9bbf&hm=4c965e4753ea2a83b0ba474f8b8fc9d721b3f05d87fab5333a1de0d7cedfd185&)  
![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391452900164636778/45645.webp?ex=686ded3f&is=686c9bbf&hm=f2b4d23972a70dc9028e8280b96e8a933370a5661b63f2dc246033a56e639956&)  
![Screenshot 4](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391452899443474442/5353.webp?ex=686ded3f&is=686c9bbf&hm=001fedcfa19bb0c371598d38152f348338d2f83350e9d32e76d31ceb31ee9f81&)  

</details>

🎨 **Modern Textures & Custom UI**  
Enjoy updated textures and GUI inspired by newer Minecraft versions, custom loading screens, and a personalized main menu that fits the modpack’s aesthetic.

<details>
<summary>📸 Screenshots (UI & Textures)</summary>

![UI 1](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391402598044532837/1431244-1.webp?ex=686e6726&is=686d15a6&hm=846aceb0546940b8678ea4dc7eae8f785e860877586ee9e19bfe4702817e09c0&)  
![UI 2](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391403961344327750/2131.webp?ex=686e686b&is=686d16eb&hm=1722219aea90718996d600860684967565fc58471326b00d9301d2145b27bf44&)  
![UI 3](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1388948939679727699/1391404448122802197/AE.webp?ex=686e68df&is=686d175f&hm=d62a2956e020fb1559707570069d413907d4aababf7a249340f231773c614fa2&)  

</details>

🧾 **600+ Handcrafted Quests**  
Follow detailed questlines covering magic, tech, bosses, automation, and lore. Stay engaged and always have a goal to pursue.

<details>
<summary>📸 Screenshot (Quests)</summary>

![Quest Screenshot](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1208/829/2-1-png.png)

</details>

⚙️ **Advanced Automation & Production**  
Build powerful automated systems, tech factories, and efficient pipelines with full support from the best industrial mods.

🔧 **Custom Recipes & Balanced Progression**  
Reworked recipes for better balance between magic and technology — no shortcuts, just rewarding progression.

💎 **Unique Items & Rare Artifacts**  
Find powerful tools, mystical items, and rare gear that enhance your abilities and shape your adventure.

[![Join Our Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NANOMAGIC/MP_NANOMAGIC_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/tJBrE2RGYk)
